entries.raw:
BARGHEST
Threat: 4 Initiative: 3d6+4
Body: 8 Willpower: 5
Agility: 6 Logic: 1
Reaction: 6 Intuition: 4
Edge: - Charisma: 2
Magic: 4

Def Score: 4 Wound Lmt: 8
Move Rate: 14m Health: 12

DEFENSES
Dmg Resistance (Thick Hide): 14
SKILLS
Primary [6]: Athletics, Close Combat, Perception
Secondary [3]: Stealth, Outdoors
WEAPONS ACTION ATK DV
Bite Complex 14 8P
Claws Major 16 6P
TRAITS
Vision Enhancements: Low-Light
Dual Natured: The barghest always exists on both the
astral and physical planes, and can interact with
anything on either plane. Their Armor applies to
attacks from both the physical and astral planes.
ABILITIES
Hunter’s Howl (Major Action): The barghest
unleashes a terrifying howl that causes their prey to
stumble as their muscles uncontrollably seize up. Any
living being that can hear the howl is affected as if by
the Slow spell, with a Force equal to the Barghest’s
Magic. This is a sonic effect – any bonuses against
sonic attacks apply to a target’s resistance test. If a
target gets zero hits on their resistance test, they also
gain the Immobilized status for the duration of the
effect. This effect ends per the duration of the Slow
spell, or if the barghest is killed. If a target succeeds
on their resistance test, they cannot be affected by this
power again for 24 hours.
Latching Jaws: If the barghest hits a target with its
Bite attack, it immediately makes a subdual test: Body
+ Athletics opposed by the target’s (Body or Agility)
+ Athletics. If the barghest wins, the target gains the
Immobilized status. The barghest can only
immobilize 1 target at a time. The target can spend a
Major Action to repeat the subdual test. If the target
wins, they are no longer Immobilized.
Swift: The barghest can take the Run action as a
Minor Action, and the Move Action as a Free action
(but can still only take each once per Combat Turn).
The barghest does not suffer Liability on tests when
they take the Run action.

entries.name: CHUPACABRA (BLOOD SPIRIT)

abilities.name: Blood Thirst
abilities.text: Once per Initiative Pass, at the end of any enemy’s Action Phase, the chupacabra can use its Bite attack.

abilities.name: Death from Above
abilities.text: The chupacabra can move across vertical surfaces and along ceilings at its Movement Rate without making any climbing tests.

abilities.name: Drain Blood
abilities.text: When the chupacabra damages a target with its Bite attack, it heals 2 damage.

abilities.name: Launch Spines
abilities.text: The chupacabra can launch a volley of spines out of its body. This is an AOE attack (see above) affecting everyone within 20m. The chupacabra cannot use this attack again for 10 minutes.

abilities.name: Poisonous Bite
abilities.text: A target that takes damage from the chupacabra’s Bite attack is afflicted with a Power 6 toxin. The target must make a Body + Willpower toxin resistance test with a threshold of the toxin’s Power. If they fail, the target gains the Sick status. While they have the Sick status, the target also suffers the Impaired status. The target can repeat the toxin resistance test at the end of each of their Action Phases to end the effect early. Otherwise, the Sick status ends after 1 minute.

abilities.name: Unstoppable
abilities.text: On their turn, the chupacabra can take 2 damage to end an ongoing effect or status on them.

traits.name: Unphased
traits.text: Can’t gain Frightened or Wounded status.

traits.name: Dual Natured
traits.text: The chupacabra always exists on both

traits.name: the astral and physical planes, and can interact with
anything on either plane. Their Armor applies to
attacks from both the physical and astral planes.

entries.name: GHOUL

abilities.name: Diseased
abilities.text: If the ghoul damages a target with a melee attack, it delivers the HMHVV III disease, with a Power of 4. The target must make a disease resistance test using Body + Willpower against a threshold of the disease’s Power. If they fail, the target gains the Sick status. This disease onsets 12 hours later, giving the target the Impaired status. The target can repeat the disease resistance test at the end of each day to end the Sick status. After 3 days, if they have not removed the Sick status, the target turns into a ghoul.

traits.name: Dual Natured

traits.name: and physical planes, and can interact with anything
on either plane. Their Armor applies to attacks from
both the physical and astral planes.
Aversion to Sunlight
traits.text: While in natural sunlight, a

traits.name: ghoul suffers Liability on all tests.
Pack Hunter
traits.text: If one or more of the ghoul’s allies is

traits.name: within melee reach of a target, the ghoul gains
Leverage on melee attacks against that target.

The target must make a disease resistance test using Body + Willpower against a threshold of the disease’s Power. If they fail, the target gains the Sick status. This disease onsets 12 hours later, giving the target the Impaired status. The target can repeat the disease resistance test at the end of each day to end the Sick status. After 3 days, if they have not removed the Sick status, the target turns into a ghoul.

abilities.name: Sacrifice
abilities.text: When they are hit by an attack, the ghoul shaman can spend their Interrupt action to make the attack target an adjacent willing ally instead. If the attack would miss the new target, it instead hits with 0 net hits.

TRAITS
Physical Resistance
Unphased: Can’t gain Frightened or Wounded status.
Toxin & Disease Immunity: The spirit is immune to
diseases & toxins other than insecticides.
Banishing Resistance: When targeted by the Negate
Mysticism power, double the spirit’s Force.
Dual Natured: Insect spirits always exist on both the
astral and physical plane.
ABILITIES
Stinger: The damage from the spirit’s Stinger attack is
toxin damage – any bonuses or penalties the target
has for toxin resistance tests apply to their damage
resistance test. Additionally, the stinger delivers a
toxin with a Power of 3. The target must make a Body
+ Willpower toxin resistance test with a threshold of
the toxin’s Power. If they fail, the target gains the Sick
status. This toxin causes the target to suffer the
Immobilized and Impaired statuses. The target can
repeat the toxin resistance test at the end of each
Combat Turn to end the effect early. Otherwise, the
Sick status ends after 1 minute.

entries.name: MELDED BEAR

abilities.name: Bear Hug
abilities.text: If the melded bear hits a target with a melee attack, it immediately makes a subdual test: Body + Athletics opposed by the target’s (Body or Agility) + Athletics. If the melded bear wins, the target gains the Grabbed status. The melded bear can only grab 1 target at a time. The target can spend a Major Action to repeat the subdual test. If the target wins, they are no longer Grabbed.

abilities.name: Camouflage
abilities.text: Sitting still in one spot for 10 minutes, a melded bear can camouflage itself to become effectively invisible on both the physical and astral planes. Observers make an Intuition + Perception test opposed by the bear’s Agility + Stealth test. If they win this test, they notice the melded bear. This effect ends when the bear takes an action.

entries.name: ULTHARACHNA

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.text: A target that takes damage from the ultharachna’s Bite attack is afflicted with a Power 8 toxin. The target must make a toxin resistance test using Body + Willpower. Reduce the Power of the toxin by their hits. The target takes Physical damage equal to the remaining Power of the toxin.

abilities.name: Cocoon
abilities.text: Once per Combat Turn, if the ultharachna hits a target with its Slash attack, it can attempt to wrap the target in webbing. The target makes an Agility + Athletics (5) escaping test. If they fail, the target gains the Paralyzed status. On their turn, the target can spend a Major Action to make a Body + Athletics (5) escaping test to free themselves from the webbing.

abilities.name: Death from Above
abilities.text: The ultharachna can move across vertical surfaces and along ceilings at its Movement Rate without making any climbing tests.

abilities.name: Spider Legs
abilities.text: At the end of any enemy’s Action Phase, if they are within reach, the ultharachna uses its Slash attack against them. The ultharachna cannot use this power more than 8 times before its next Action Phase.

abilities.name: Unstoppable
abilities.text: On their turn, the ultharachna can take damage to end an ongoing effect or status on them. The damage is equal to the threshold for the test to end the ongoing effect or status.

abilities.name: Web Tendril
abilities.text: The ultharachna shoots a strand of webbing at a target and pulls the target to it. The ultharachna makes an attack test with a dice pool of 20 against any target within 40m. On a hit, the target makes an opposed Body + Athletics test against the ultharachna. If the ultharachna wins, the target is pulled adjacent to the ultharachna.

abilities.text: On attack tests, the webspawn scores a critical hit with their Crit Dice on a 5 or a 6.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.text: The webspawn can exude sticky strands of webbing to wrap around a target. If the webspawn hits a target with its Slash attack, it immediately makes a subdual test: Body + Athletics opposed by the target’s (Body or Agility) + Athletics. If the webspawn wins, the target gains the Grabbed status. If a target gets zero hits on their subdual test, they also gain the Immobilized status as long as they are Grabbed. The target can spend a Major Action to repeat the subdual test. If the target wins, they are no longer Grabbed. The webspawn can only have one target Ensnared at a time.
